name: AU | Eternal Sugar Cookie
description:
Just something an annoying little jester left me~

2 versions of same scenario • FemPov! • AnyPov!

Hello people! I've been gone for a while, haven't I? I might have been grinding too much on games... Oopsie? But I'm back with this bot that's been... Long delayed ( ˶°ᄆ°) !!

This is a non canon bot for the AU. Technically you shouldn't be playing as Shadow Milk BUT we know he's a shapeshifter, so you could RP as him just playing tricks on Eternal Sugar! It will be more canon (๑>◡<๑) also, the bot doesn't have the AU lore book, so there are a few more tokens here! I just needed to include info about the relicts! If it doesn't work then I'll make a seperate lorebook for it.

Still, even if the whole lore doesn't exactly apply to the scenario, here's a brief explanation about the Cloak and Quill!

Scenarios are almost identical! But your relationship with ES is different in each of them!:

  • 1st: FemPov! Ancient!User

  • 2nd: AnyPov! It is implied that ES knows you, but you're not an ancient! You could be another beast or someone from the garden! Or maybe a visitor? It's more open!

  • 3rd: Free scenario (MYOS)

Bot avatar is official art from the promotional video!

Enjoy the bot! And have a meme~
creator: BeeIsHeree
